name: S-48 (SS-159)
events: 21 Mar 1942 USS S-48 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
22 Mar 1942 USS S-48 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.

16 Jul 1942 USS S-48 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.

12 Nov 1944 USS S-48 arrived at the Philadelphia Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for a refit.
1 Feb 1945 USS S-48 departed the Philadelphia Navy Yard for New London, Connecticut.
4 Feb 1945 USS S-48 arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
26 Feb 1945 USS S-48 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
27 Feb 1945 USS S-48 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
